title: The Kiss Barrier
writer: Fanny Hatton, Frederic Hatton, E. Magnus Ingleton
actors: Edmund Lowe, Claire Adams, Diana Miller
plot: Aviator Richard March, is shot down over France, though not badly hurt in the crash, he steals a kiss from Marion Weston, the Red Cross nurse whose ambulance comes to his aid. After the war, Richard resumes his professional life a...
